import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card'; import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'; import { LineChart, Line, XAxis, YAxis, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts'; const generatePulse = (base, volatility = 1.8) => { const now = Date.now(); return Array.from({ length: 9 }, (_, i) => ({ time: new Date(now - (9 - i) * 1000).toLocaleTimeString(), price: +(base + (Math.random() - 0.5) * volatility).toFixed(2), })); }; const BuySharesModal = ({ label, latestPrice, onClose }) => { const [shares, setShares] = useState(1000); const total = +(latestPrice * shares).toFixed(2); return (

Buy Shares in {label}

Share Price: R{latestPrice.toLocaleString('en-ZA', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 })}

setShares(Number(e.target.value))} className="border w-full p-2 rounded text-black" />

Total: R{total.toLocaleString('en-ZA')}

); }; const PulseBlock = ({ label = '', color = '#000000', data = [], icon = '' }) => { const hasData = Array.isArray(data) && data.length > 0; const fallbackData = generatePulse(17.23); const chartData = hasData ? data : fallbackData; const latestPrice = chartData[chartData.length - 1]?.price; const currencyPrefix = label.includes("USD") ? '$' : label.includes("POUND") ? '£' : label.includes("EURO") ? '€' : label.includes("BTC") ? '₿' : label.includes("ETH") ? 'Ξ' : 'R'; const [metricsVisible, setMetricsVisible] = useState(false); const [glow, setGlow] = useState(false); const [modalOpen, setModalOpen] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { const interval = setInterval(() => { setGlow(true); setTimeout(() => setGlow(false), 600); }, 9000); return () => clearInterval(interval); }, []); return (

{icon} {label}™

{latestPrice !== null && latestPrice !== undefined ? `${currencyPrefix}${latestPrice.toLocaleString('en-ZA', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 })}` : 'N/A'}
`${currencyPrefix}${value.toLocaleString('en-ZA', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 })}`} />

Now Available: {label} Pack

{metricsVisible && (

Last Price: {latestPrice}

Chart Points: {chartData.length}

High: {Math.max(...chartData.map(p => p.price))}

Low: {Math.min(...chartData.map(p => p.price))}

{!['Tesla Corp','Nike Futures','SpaceY','Apple Vision'].includes(label) && ( <>

Estimated Valuation: R{(latestPrice * 1000000).toLocaleString('en-ZA', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 })}

Main IP: {label} Sovereign Systems

Value Proposition: Empowering global cognition through scalable, adaptive branded intelligence.

FAA Share: 24.9% of 10,000,000 shares = 2,490,000 shares

Fruitful Global Share: 24.9% of 10,000,000 shares = 2,490,000 shares

)} {label === 'MyUniverse.ai' && (

Injected Metric: 15% of 1000% shares = 0.1 — Ecosystem node anomaly active

)}
)} {modalOpen && setModalOpen(false)} />} ); }; const PulseGrid = () => { const [pulseData, setPulseData] = useState({}); const brands = [ { label: 'Tesla Corp', icon: '⚡', base: 238.73, color: '#e53935' }, { label: 'Nike Futures', icon: '👟', base: 112.42, color: '#1e88e5' }, { label: 'SpaceY', icon: '🚀', base: 872.13, color: '#43a047' }, { label: 'Apple Vision', icon: '🍏', base: 188.99, color: '#fdd835' }, { label: 'MyUniverse.ai', icon: '🧠', base: 17.39, color: '#00e5ff' }, { label: 'Vrugtige.Planet', icon: '🌸', base: 1.22, color: '#f06292' }, { label: 'Meta SkinOS', icon: '🧬', base: 72.58, color: '#9c27b0' }, { label: 'ByteNest Drone', icon: '🦅', base: 142.33, color: '#0288d1' }, { label: 'Omega Fleet', icon: '🛰️', base: 392.77, color: '#f4511e' }, { label: 'Zion Thread™', icon: '🪡', base: 6.61, color: '#5e35b1' }, { label: 'Omnikey Identity', icon: '🔐', base: 9.81, color: '#37474f' }, { label: 'Echo Plant Co.', icon: '🌱', base: 4.22, color: '#43a047' }, { label: 'VaultHearts', icon: '💖', base: 13.95, color: '#e91e63' }, { label: 'Fruitful Global Login', icon: '🌐', base: 1.00, color: '#4fc3f7' }, { label: 'Hotstack Core UI', icon: '🔥', base: 1.00, color: '#ff3d00' } ]; useEffect(() => { const updatePulse = () => { const newPulseData = {}; brands.forEach(({ label, base }) => { newPulseData[label] = generatePulse(base); }); setPulseData(newPulseData); }; updatePulse(); const interval = setInterval(updatePulse, 3000); return () => clearInterval(interval); }, []); return (
{brands.map(({ label, icon, color }) => ( ))}
); }; export default PulseGrid; import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent } from "@/components/ui/tabs"; import { Globe, Leaf, ShieldCheck, ShoppingCart, Palette, Baby, BarChart, FlaskConical, MountainSnow, Users, Smartphone } from "lucide-react"; const brands = [ { name: "CodeNest™", icon: , atomIntro: `CodeNest™ is a web dev scroll suite optimized for freelancers, solo builders and claim-first digital studios. It’s equipped with mini-site creators, a fast glyph deployer and auto-claim triggers synced to DeployNow™.`, license: "$3,200", monthly: "$45 / $80 / $175", royalty: "6%", includes: ['Mini-scroll builder', 'Site glyphs', 'Client claim tokens'], features: ['Pulse-ready claim zones', 'DeployNow™ integrated', 'Client-signed ledger links'], metrics: { scrollsIssued: 412, avgYield: "$3,840/mo", timeToPayout: "9.4s", coverage: "87%" } }, { name: "PayLine™", icon: , atomIntro: `PayLine™ delivers sovereign payroll via FAA payout mesh. Engineered for instant wages, it links TaxTrace™, VaultPay™, and contract workers via fast invoice scroll syncs.`, license: "$4,100", monthly: "$58 / $110 / $250", royalty: "9%", includes: ['Employee vaults', 'Payflow node', 'Invoice scroll generator'], features: ['SME compliance ready', 'Realtime TaxTrace™', 'VaultPay™ secure relay'], metrics: { scrollsIssued: 591, avgYield: "$4,900/mo", timeToPayout: "6.2s", coverage: "82%" } }, { name: "HotStack™", icon: , atomIntro: `HotStack™ generates websites in minutes. Perfect for brands, events, and creators needing quick, branded, payout-connected sites deployed via VaultDNS™.`, license: "$3,600", monthly: "$49 / $95 / $200", royalty: "7%", includes: ['Deployment token', 'Template scrolls', 'DNS auto-binder'], features: ['3-min site deploy', 'ScrollStack™ core', 'VaultDNS™ confirmed zone'], metrics: { scrollsIssued: 612, avgYield: "$3,760/mo", timeToPayout: "7.1s", coverage: "91%" } }, { name: "QuickClaim™", icon: , atomIntro: `QuickClaim™ is a scroll checkout engine built for creators, vendors, and instant commerce drops. Use one link, one product, one payout — every scroll verified.`, license: "$2,800", monthly: "$42 / $78 / $160", royalty: "6%", includes: ['Checkout scroll', 'Sigil hook', 'Receipt module'], features: ['ScrollCart™ ready', 'Mobile optimized', 'AutoClaim™ verified'], metrics: { scrollsIssued: 722, avgYield: "$3,120/mo", timeToPayout: "9.5s", coverage: "88%" } }, { name: "FirstMover™", icon: , atomIntro: `FirstMover™ offers 1st-use scroll logic for claimers and innovation brands. Once used, the scroll NFT triggers exclusivity locking via VaultScan™.`, license: "$5,900", monthly: "$72 / $140 / $300", royalty: "12%", includes: ['Exclusive badge', 'NFT wrapper', 'Claim scroll'], features: ['GhostTrace™ audit', 'VaultScan™ confirm', 'First-to-Use logic'], metrics: { scrollsIssued: 109, avgYield: "$6,920/mo", timeToPayout: "8.4s", coverage: "64%" } } ]; export default function FruitfulCrateSmartGrid() { return (

🍇 Fruitful™ Crate Dance™ Smart Grid

🧩 Scroll Brands 🌐 Overview 📦 Modules 🧪 Pipeline
{brands.map((brand, idx) => ( {brand.icon}

{brand.name}

Atom-Level Intro

{brand.atomIntro}

  • 💳 License: {brand.license}
  • 📆 Monthly: {brand.monthly}
  • 📈 Royalty: {brand.royalty}
  • 📦 Includes: {brand.includes.join(', ')}
  • 🧠 Features: {brand.features.join(', ')}

Performance Metrics

🔖 Scrolls Issued: {brand.metrics.scrollsIssued}

💵 Avg Yield: {brand.metrics.avgYield}

⚡ Payout Speed: {brand.metrics.timeToPayout}

🌐 Region Coverage: {brand.metrics.coverage}

 ))}

Welcome to the FAA-synced Smart Grid layout for Heyns Schoeman. This deployment activates:

  • Full FAA-compliant module breakdown
  • Subpage icon exposure
  • Banimal™ loop + Sponsor logic hook
  • Foxed™ mobile relay & design tiers
🧠 FAA Edge™ Compliance Core
Inline Verification™, Legal Ledger, Sponsor Contracts 🛠️ Partner Onboarding Portal
Crate Tier Select, Licensing, Sponsor Gateway 🛒 Fruitful Marketplace Core
Banimal™, Samfox, Crate Checkout by Region 📦 Showcase Management Engine
Live Street Events, Cultural Audit Trail 🎽 Design Competition Engine
Myth Compass™, Lore AI, 1/1 Reward Drops 🍼 Banimal™ Giving Loop
Meal Tracker, NGO Feed Log, Kind Creatures Archive 📊 Crate Intelligence Grid
Logic Spread, Riddle Heatmap, Real-Time Stats 🧪 Myth Tech Stack + Foxed™ Node
NFT Riddles, GPS Crates, Mobile Foxed™ Drop Relay
📃 Investor Deck — Tier 1 brand pitch
Status: Drafting 🔴 🛠️ Sponsor Dashboard — Meals + Impact Feed
Status: Design Phase 🟡 🎥 Live CrateCam™ Feed — Street Events Live
Status: Prototype 🔴 🧩 Logic Grid Sync Engine — Centralized FAA Logic
Status: Queued 🟡 📦 Crate ROI Tracker — Build-to-Impact Map
Status: Conceptual 🔴 🦊 Foxed™ Mobile Deployment — Street Relay App
Status: In Planning 🔴
